key_improvements.title: Phase 0 Empirical Validation
key_improvements.description: Run Phase 0 experiments demonstrating that LLM behavior admits tractable finite-state abstraction.

key_improvements.title: Close Lean-to-Implementation Gap
key_improvements.description: Honestly scope verification claims, add property-based testing.

key_improvements.title: Classifier Robustness Analysis
key_improvements.description: Add robustness analysis for behavioral atom classifiers.

key_improvements.title: Multi-Configuration Real LLM Experiments
key_improvements.description: Test gpt-4.1-nano under 3 system-prompt configurations. 7/15 prompts diverge across configs.

key_improvements.title: CoalCEGAR Convergence Proof
key_improvements.description: Prove convergence for safety fragment with explicit iteration bounds.

key_improvements.title: Random Sampling Baseline Comparison
key_improvements.description: Compare CABER against naive random sampling.

key_improvements.title: Paper Rewrite Addressing All Critiques
key_improvements.description: Rewrite tool_paper.tex to address Category B critiques.

key_improvements.title: Honest PAC Bound Scoping
key_improvements.description: Added sample complexity reality check table (Table pac-gap) showing required vs operating samples for various (eps,delta) settings. Abstract, intro, and limitations all now clearly state PAC bounds are vacuous at 90 samples. Recommend Bayesian posteriors instead.

key_improvements.title: Classifier Overfitting Transparency
key_improvements.description: Prominently discuss LOPO CV drops (0.55-0.69) as the most important limitation. Explain that per-atom F1 0.93-1.00 is within-distribution only. Reframe evaluation summary to flag this as key limitation.

key_improvements.title: Non-Functorial Abstraction Analysis
key_improvements.description: Added formal analysis of when abstraction IS functorial (deterministic, stable clustering). Explained impact on end-to-end guarantees. Noted that eps_abs term in Theorem 3 requires local stability assumption.

key_improvements.title: Math Rigor Pass
key_improvements.description: Reviewed all theorems. Added Remark on verification status noting paper-only proofs with three corrections applied. Verified proofs are mathematically sound. Added scoping for non-functorial impact on Theorem 3.

key_improvements.title: Hallucination Check
key_improvements.description: Verified all 23 bibliography entries are real papers. Verified key numerical claims (phase0 accuracies, PDFA baseline, convergence data, robustness numbers) match results files. Three bibitem key-year mismatches are cosmetic only.

key_improvements.title: README/API/Grounding Update
key_improvements.description: README rewritten with 30-sec quickstart and prominent limitations. API.md updated with accurate not-implemented list. grounding.json updated with 35 claims and 21 honest limitations.
